title: Host Hotels & Resorts Provides Updated Fourth Quarter 2021 Investor Presentation
text: BETHESDA, Md., Feb. 17, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the nation's largest lodging real estate investment trust (the "Company"), today provided an updated investor presentation for fourth quarter 2021 results. The investor presentation can be found on the Investor Relations section on the company's website at https://www.hosthotels.com/investor-relations/investor-presentation.

title: Host Hotels' (HST) FFO and Revenues Beat Estimates in Q4
text: While Host Hotels' (HST) total revenues record a significant improvement in the December quarter, room revenues see a decline.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (HST) CEO Jim Risoleo on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (HST) CEO Jim Risoleo on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. Reports Results for 2021
text: Fourth Quarter Represented Highest RevPAR of 2021; Successful Execution of Capital Allocation Strategy – Since the Start of 2021, Acquired $1.6 Billion and Disposed of $1 Billion Announces Reinstatement of Quarterly Dividend

title: Host Hotels (HST) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Host Hotels (HST) is likely to have benefited in Q4 from the recovery in leisure demand, a continued ramp-up in business transient and group demand.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts: Travel Demand Might Saturate, But Company Could Still Thrive
text: Host Hotels & Resorts has seen an impressive rebound in RevPAR as luxury travel demand has started to rebound. It remains to be seen whether the company can ultimately grow this metric back to pre-pandemic levels.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts Acquires Hotel Van Zandt and Disposes of Sheraton Boston
text: BETHESDA, Md., Feb. 02, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the nation's largest lodging real estate investment trust (the "Company"), today announced that it has acquired the fee simple interest in the Hotel Van Zandt, a 319-room luxury lifestyle hotel in Austin, Texas for a purchase price of approximately $246 million including its $4 million FF&E reserve. The net acquisition price of approximately $242 million represents a 13.2x multiple on 2019 EBITDA1 and stabilization is expected in the 2025-2027 timeframe at approximately 10-12x EBITDA1.
